validation_details.title: Graphic Designer
validation_details.reason: Clear, plain-language title that accurately describes the work and is commonly used in the private sector.

validation_details.title: Visual Communications Specialist
validation_details.reason: Specific enough to signal work in visual communication and design; understandable to outside jobseekers.

validation_details.title: Multimedia Designer
validation_details.reason: Descriptive and commonly used; conveys design work across multiple media.

validation_details.title: Exhibit Designer
validation_details.reason: Clear and specific; jobseekers can understand this as designing exhibits or displays.

validation_details.title: Digital Content Designer
validation_details.reason: Reasonably specific and understandable, though somewhat broad; still conveys digital content design work.

validation_details.title: Environmental Graphic Designer
validation_details.reason: A recognized private-sector title for designers who create signage, wayfinding, and spatial graphics.

validation_details.title: Exhibition Graphic Designer
validation_details.reason: Specific and descriptive; clearly indicates graphic design for exhibitions.

validation_details.title: Museum Graphic Designer
validation_details.reason: Clear enough and descriptive of graphic design work in a museum setting.

validation_details.title: Social Media Coordinator
validation_details.reason: Common private-sector title that clearly indicates social media coordination work.

validation_details.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
validation_details.reason: Widely used, plain-language title that clearly conveys digital marketing work.

validation_details.title: Marketing Designer
validation_details.reason: Specific enough to indicate design work supporting marketing efforts.

validation_details.title: Visual Communications Designer
validation_details.reason: Descriptive and understandable; indicates design work focused on visual communication.

validation_details.title: Visual Designer
validation_details.reason: Common private-sector title, though broad; still understandable as a design role.

validation_details.title: Digital Content Specialist
validation_details.reason: Clear and commonly used title for work involving digital content creation or management.

validation_details.title: Digital Media Specialist
validation_details.reason: Plain-language and understandable, though broad; still conveys digital media work.

validation_details.title: Marketing Graphic Designer
validation_details.reason: Specific and descriptive; clearly indicates graphic design for marketing materials.

validation_details.title: Multimedia Production Manager
validation_details.reason: Specific enough to indicate management of multimedia production work.

validation_details.title: Visual Communications Manager
validation_details.reason: Clear and descriptive; jobseekers can understand this as managing visual communications work.

validation_details.title: Digital Content Manager
validation_details.reason: Plain-language and specific enough to indicate management of digital content work.

validation_details.title: E-Learning Developer
validation_details.reason: Recognized private-sector title for someone who develops online learning content.

validation_details.title: Exhibit Design Manager
validation_details.reason: Clear and specific; indicates management of exhibit design work.

validation_details.title: Graphic Design Manager
validation_details.reason: Straightforward and descriptive; clearly indicates management of graphic design work.

validation_details.title: Instructional Designer
validation_details.reason: Well-known private-sector title that clearly describes the work.

validation_details.title: Multimedia Content Designer
validation_details.reason: Descriptive and understandable, though somewhat broad; still clearly design-focused.

validation_details.title: Visual Information Specialist
validation_details.reason: This is still federal jargon and not as plain-language as the other titles. It does not clearly tell outside jobseekers what the person actually does.

validation_details.title: Broadcast Technician
validation_details.reason: Common, plain-language title that clearly describes technical broadcast work.

validation_details.title: Creative Services Supervisor
validation_details.reason: Too vague and corporate/federal-sounding. It does not describe the actual creative work or specialty area.

validation_details.title: Exhibit Planning Manager
validation_details.reason: Specific enough to indicate management of exhibit planning work.

validation_details.title: Marketing Communications Specialist
validation_details.reason: Common private-sector title that clearly conveys marketing communications work.

validation_details.title: Multimedia Content Creator
validation_details.reason: Plain-language and understandable; clearly indicates content creation across media formats.

validation_details.title: Museum Collections Manager
validation_details.reason: Specific and descriptive; clearly indicates management of museum collections.

validation_details.title: Museum Exhibits Director
validation_details.reason: Clear and specific leadership title for museum exhibit work.

validation_details.title: Presentation Designer
validation_details.reason: Common private-sector title that clearly describes designing presentations and related visuals.

validation_details.title: Print Designer
validation_details.reason: Clear and commonly understood title for print-focused design work.

validation_details.title: Print Production Designer
validation_details.reason: Specific enough to indicate design work tied to print production.

validation_details.title: Print Production Specialist
validation_details.reason: Understandable and specific enough to indicate print production work.

validation_details.title: Retail Merchandising Supervisor
validation_details.reason: Common private-sector title that clearly indicates supervision of retail merchandising work.

validation_details.title: Social Media Content Creator
validation_details.reason: Clear and plain-language title that jobseekers would understand.

validation_details.title: Social Media Specialist
validation_details.reason: Widely used private-sector title that clearly conveys social media work.

validation_details.title: Video Conferencing Technician
validation_details.reason: Specific and understandable technical title.

validation_details.title: Video Production Technician
validation_details.reason: Clear and descriptive title for technical video production work.

validation_details.title: Visual Merchandising Lead
validation_details.reason: Recognized private-sector title that clearly indicates leadership in visual merchandising.

validation_details.title: Web Content Coordinator
validation_details.reason: Common and understandable title for coordinating web content work.

validation_details.title: Web Content Manager
validation_details.reason: Clear and descriptive management title for web content work.

validation_details.title: Web Content Specialist
validation_details.reason: Plain-language and understandable title for web content work.

titles.title: Graphic Designer
titles.description: Creates visual assets such as logos, layouts, brochures, posters, and other print or digital materials. Works with stakeholders to translate requirements into polished designs that communicate information clearly and consistently.

titles.title: Visual Communications Specialist
titles.description: Develops visual materials that explain ideas, programs, or services through graphics, charts, presentations, and other communication products. Ensures content is visually clear, on-brand, and tailored to the intended audience.

titles.title: Multimedia Designer
titles.description: Produces integrated visual content across formats such as graphics, animation, audio, video, and interactive media. Designs and assembles multimedia products for presentations, training, marketing, or public outreach.

titles.title: Exhibit Designer
titles.description: Plans and designs museum, trade show, or public exhibits, including layout, graphics, signage, and visitor flow. Coordinates visual and spatial elements to create engaging and informative displays.

titles.title: Digital Content Designer
titles.description: Creates digital-first visual and interactive content for websites, social media, email, and other online channels. Focuses on making content engaging, accessible, and aligned with communication goals.

titles.title: Environmental Graphic Designer
titles.description: Designs signage, wayfinding, environmental graphics, and branded visual elements for physical spaces. Helps people navigate and experience buildings, campuses, museums, or public areas through clear visual systems.

titles.title: Exhibition Graphic Designer
titles.description: Creates graphics, labels, panels, and visual elements used in exhibits and displays. Works closely with exhibit teams to present information in a visually compelling and easy-to-read format.

titles.title: Museum Graphic Designer
titles.description: Designs graphics and visual materials for museum exhibits, programs, and public-facing communications. Produces labels, signage, promotional pieces, and interpretive visuals that support museum storytelling.

titles.title: Social Media Coordinator
titles.description: Plans, schedules, and posts content across social media platforms while monitoring engagement and responding to routine inquiries. Supports campaigns by coordinating content calendars, approvals, and basic performance tracking.

titles.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
titles.description: Creates and manages online marketing campaigns using channels such as email, web, search, and social media. Tracks performance metrics and adjusts content or targeting to improve reach and engagement.

titles.title: Marketing Designer
titles.description: Develops visual assets for marketing campaigns, advertisements, and promotional materials. Works with marketing staff to create graphics that support branding and drive audience action.

titles.title: Visual Communications Designer
titles.description: Designs visual materials that help communicate messages, data, or concepts across print and digital formats. Combines layout, typography, and imagery to make information easier to understand and more appealing.

titles.title: Visual Designer
titles.description: Creates the overall look and feel of visual products, often for digital interfaces, presentations, or branded materials. Focuses on layout, typography, color, and imagery to produce cohesive and user-friendly designs.

titles.title: Digital Content Specialist
titles.description: Develops and updates content for websites, social media, email, and other digital channels. Ensures content is accurate, engaging, and aligned with communication or marketing objectives.

titles.title: Digital Media Specialist
titles.description: Produces and manages digital media content such as graphics, video, audio, and interactive assets. Supports communication efforts by creating content for online platforms and digital campaigns.

titles.title: Marketing Graphic Designer
titles.description: Creates graphics and visual materials specifically for marketing and advertising efforts. Produces campaign assets that support product promotion, outreach, and brand consistency.

titles.title: Multimedia Production Manager
titles.description: Oversees the planning, production, and delivery of multimedia projects such as video, audio, graphics, and interactive content. Coordinates staff, schedules, and resources to ensure projects are completed on time and to quality standards.

titles.title: Visual Communications Manager
titles.description: Leads the development of visual communication products and oversees designers or content creators. Manages projects, priorities, and quality standards for graphics, presentations, and other visual materials.

titles.title: Digital Content Manager
titles.description: Directs the creation, editing, and publishing of content across digital platforms. Oversees content strategy, workflows, and performance to ensure materials meet organizational goals.

titles.title: E-Learning Developer
titles.description: Designs and builds online training courses, modules, and learning materials. Uses instructional content, multimedia, and interactive elements to create effective digital learning experiences.

titles.title: Exhibit Design Manager
titles.description: Manages exhibit design projects from concept through installation, including schedules, budgets, and coordination with designers and fabricators. Oversees the visual and spatial development of exhibits to ensure they meet interpretive and audience goals.

titles.title: Graphic Design Manager
titles.description: Supervises graphic design staff and manages design projects, priorities, and deadlines. Ensures visual products meet branding, communication, and quality requirements.

titles.title: Instructional Designer
titles.description: Develops training materials, courses, and learning experiences based on instructional goals and audience needs. Works with subject matter experts to organize content and create effective learning activities.

titles.title: Multimedia Content Designer
titles.description: Creates content that combines graphics, video, audio, animation, or interactive elements for communication or training purposes. Designs multimedia products that are visually engaging and easy to use.

titles.title: Graphic Designer
titles.description: Creates visual assets such as logos, layouts, brochures, posters, and other print or digital materials. Works with stakeholders to translate requirements into polished designs that communicate information clearly and consistently.

titles.title: Visual Communications Specialist
titles.description: Develops visual materials that explain ideas, programs, or services through graphics, charts, presentations, and other communication products. Ensures content is visually clear, on-brand, and tailored to the intended audience.

titles.title: Presentation Designer
titles.description: Designs professional slide decks and presentation materials that communicate information clearly and persuasively. Uses layout, graphics, charts, and branding to make presentations visually effective.

titles.title: Digital Content Designer
titles.description: Creates digital-first visual and interactive content for websites, social media, email, and other online channels. Focuses on making content engaging, accessible, and aligned with communication goals.

titles.title: Broadcast Technician
titles.description: Operates and maintains equipment used for radio, television, streaming, or live broadcast production. Sets up audio, video, and transmission systems and troubleshoots technical issues during production.

titles.title: Graphic Design Manager
titles.description: Supervises graphic design staff and manages design projects, priorities, and deadlines. Ensures visual products meet branding, communication, and quality requirements.

titles.title: Creative Director
titles.description: Sets the creative vision for campaigns, publications, or digital products and guides the work of designers and content creators. Reviews concepts, approves final creative work, and ensures consistency with organizational goals.

titles.title: Design Team Lead
titles.description: Coordinates the day-to-day work of a design team, assigning tasks, reviewing output, and helping resolve design issues. Balances hands-on design work with supervision and project coordination.

titles.title: Marketing Communications Manager
titles.description: Plans and oversees marketing and communications activities that promote programs, services, or products. Manages messaging, campaigns, and content across channels to support outreach and engagement.

titles.title: Exhibit Planning Manager
titles.description: Leads the planning of exhibit projects, including scope, timelines, budgets, and coordination among curators, designers, and vendors. Ensures exhibit concepts are feasible, well-organized, and aligned with audience goals.

titles.title: Marketing Communications Specialist
titles.description: Creates and coordinates marketing and communication materials such as announcements, campaigns, newsletters, and promotional content. Supports outreach efforts by tailoring messages to target audiences and channels.

titles.title: Multimedia Content Creator
titles.description: Produces engaging content in multiple formats, such as graphics, video, audio, and interactive media. Develops materials for social media, websites, presentations, or campaigns.

titles.title: Museum Collections Manager
titles.description: Oversees the care, documentation, storage, and movement of museum collections. Manages records, handling procedures, and collection-related workflows to preserve artifacts and support access.

titles.title: Museum Exhibits Director
titles.description: Directs the planning, development, and execution of museum exhibits and interpretive experiences. Oversees exhibit strategy, staff, budgets, and coordination with curatorial and design teams.

titles.title: Presentation Designer
titles.description: Designs professional slide decks and presentation materials that communicate information clearly and persuasively. Uses layout, graphics, charts, and branding to make presentations visually effective.

titles.title: Print Designer
titles.description: Creates layouts and visual designs for printed materials such as brochures, flyers, reports, and posters. Prepares files for production and ensures the final product is visually consistent and print-ready.

titles.title: Print Production Designer
titles.description: Prepares print-ready artwork and manages the technical details of printed materials. Checks layouts, formatting, color, and specifications to ensure accurate production output.

titles.title: Print Production Specialist
titles.description: Coordinates the production of printed materials by managing specifications, proofs, vendors, and deadlines. Ensures print jobs are completed accurately, on time, and within quality standards.

titles.title: Retail Merchandising Supervisor
titles.description: Oversees retail display setup, product presentation, and merchandising standards in stores or showrooms. Supervises staff and ensures displays support sales, branding, and customer experience.

titles.title: Social Media Content Creator
titles.description: Creates posts, graphics, short videos, and other content for social media platforms. Develops engaging material that supports campaigns, audience growth, and brand awareness.

titles.title: Social Media Specialist
titles.description: Manages social media content, engagement, and basic analytics across platforms. Plans posts, monitors trends, and helps shape messaging to increase reach and interaction.

titles.title: Video Conferencing Technician
titles.description: Sets up, operates, and troubleshoots video conferencing systems and related audio-visual equipment. Supports meetings and events by ensuring reliable connectivity, sound, and video quality.

titles.title: Video Production Technician
titles.description: Operates cameras, lighting, audio, and editing equipment for video production projects. Assists with recording, setup, and technical troubleshooting during shoots and post-production.

titles.title: Visual Merchandising Lead
titles.description: Directs the presentation of products and displays in retail or showroom settings. Plans visual layouts, signage, and display standards to attract customers and support sales.

titles.title: Web Content Coordinator
titles.description: Coordinates updates, posting, and maintenance of website content across pages and sections. Works with contributors to keep web information current, accurate, and organized.

titles.title: Web Content Manager
titles.description: Oversees website content strategy, publishing workflows, and content quality. Manages updates, approvals, and coordination to ensure the site is accurate, useful, and aligned with communication goals.

titles.title: Web Content Specialist
titles.description: Writes, edits, and updates content for websites and related digital properties. Ensures pages are clear, accurate, accessible, and optimized for the intended audience.
